scope: Current public brand, social, product, and screenshot assets in the Vibelytics static landing repo.
policy: Public, external, generated, third-party, or licensed brand assets must have source, usage rights, allowed uses, attribution, and open rights questions recorded before the brand system can be called production-ready.

assets.source: Repo-local PNG. Exact generation/source file unknown.
assets.allowedUses: Currently used as repo brand evidence only until rights/source are confirmed.
openQuestions: Was this generated, hand-designed, or exported from a source file?
Is there an editable SVG/vector source?
Can it be used publicly across website, social, deck, and merchandise?

assets.source: Repo-local PNG composed from brand mark, text, and event imagery. Exact source and rights unknown.
assets.allowedUses: Currently referenced as social preview evidence only until rights/source are confirmed.
openQuestions: What is the provenance of the festival image embedded in the composition?
What tool or source file produced this asset?
Is public social distribution approved?

assets.source: Repo-local PNG. Exact generation/source file unknown.
assets.allowedUses: Currently brand evidence only until rights/source are confirmed.
openQuestions: Was this exported from the same source as the mark?
Is X/social profile usage approved?

assets.source: Repo-local PNG. Exact generation/source file unknown.
assets.allowedUses: Currently brand evidence only until rights/source are confirmed.
openQuestions: What imagery or generated outputs are embedded?
Is X/social header usage approved?

assets.source: Repo-local PNG. Appears generated or composited; exact source unknown.
assets.allowedUses: Currently used on `/` and social compositions; should be confirmed or replaced before production brand signoff.
openQuestions: Was the base event image generated, licensed, or sourced publicly?
Are network overlays generated or manually composited?
Can it be used in public website/social/deck contexts?

assets.source: Repo-local PNG. Appears generated or composited; exact source unknown.
assets.allowedUses: Currently used in `/` and `/pilot`; should be confirmed or replaced before production brand signoff.
openQuestions: Was the map/city imagery generated or sourced?
Can it be used publicly without attribution?
Does the visual risk implying live audience tracking?

assets.source: Repo-local PNG. Appears generated or composited; exact source unknown.
assets.allowedUses: Currently used on `/`; should be confirmed or replaced before production brand signoff.
openQuestions: Was this image generated, licensed, or photographed?
Are venue/person likeness rights clear?

assets.allowedUses: Repo evidence only unless used in current route; confirm before expanding usage.
openQuestions: Was this image generated, licensed, or photographed?
Does this asset fit the preferred brand territory?

assets.allowedUses: Repo evidence only unless used in current route; confirm before expanding usage.
openQuestions: Was this generated from an earlier UI?
Should it be preserved or replaced by current `/pilot` screenshots?

assets.usageRights: Derivative of repo-local implementation and assets; inherits open asset provenance questions.
assets.allowedUses: Internal docs and submission evidence pending upstream asset-rights confirmation.
openQuestions: Screenshot contains assets whose provenance is still unknown.
